hooks.command: which just >/dev/null 2>&1 || (echo 'Installing just...' && cargo install just 2>/dev/null) || echo 'Warning: could not install just. Use /project:ci and other skills which include cargo fallback commands.'
which cargo-llvm-cov >/dev/null 2>&1 || (echo 'Installing cargo-llvm-cov...' && cargo install cargo-llvm-cov 2>/dev/null) || echo 'Warning: could not install cargo-llvm-cov.'
which cargo-dupes >/dev/null 2>&1 || (echo 'Installing cargo-dupes...' && cargo install cargo-dupes 2>/dev/null) || echo 'Warning: could not install cargo-dupes.'

which sphinx-build >/dev/null 2>&1 || (echo 'Installing Sphinx and extensions...' && pip3 install --break-system-packages sphinx furo sphinx-inline-tabs sphinx-copybutton pytz sphinx-design 2>/dev/null) || echo 'Warning: could not install Sphinx. Run docs setup manually with: cd docs && just setup'
